regions.name: block_scale
regions.description: FP16 scale shared across 32 INT8 weights

regions.name: weights
regions.description: 32 × 4-bit weights packed as 16 bytes (2 nibbles/byte, MSB=high nibble)

regions.name: super_scale_d
regions.description: FP16 super-scale d — multiplies all 8 sub-block scales; 1 bit flip corrupts all 256 weights

regions.name: super_scale_dmin
regions.description: FP16 super-scale dmin — multiplies all 8 sub-block mins; 1 bit flip corrupts all 256 weights

regions.name: sub_scales
regions.description: 8×6-bit sub-scales + 8×6-bit sub-mins packed into 12 bytes; each sub-scale affects 32 weights

regions.name: weights
regions.description: 256 × 4-bit weights packed as 128 bytes (2 nibbles per byte)

regions.name: weights_low
regions.description: Lower 4 bits of 256 × 6-bit weights, packed as 128 bytes

regions.name: weights_high
regions.description: Upper 2 bits of 256 × 6-bit weights, packed as 64 bytes

regions.name: sub_scales
regions.description: 16 × INT8 sub-block scales; each affects 16 weights

regions.name: super_scale_d
regions.description: FP16 super-scale d — multiplies all 16 sub-block scales; 1 bit flip corrupts all 256 weights

block_layout.name: block_scale
block_layout.description: FP16 scale shared across 32 INT8 weights

block_layout.name: weights
block_layout.description: 32 × INT8 weights (bit7=sign, max swing ±127×scale)

tensors.name: token_embd.weight
tensors.reason_out_of_scope: Embedding tensor excluded from flip pool
